scripts.version:patch: pnpm -r exec -- npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && node -e "const p=require('./packages/core/package.json'); console.log('v'+p.version)"
scripts.version:minor: pnpm -r exec -- npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && node -e "const p=require('./packages/core/package.json'); console.log('v'+p.version)"
scripts.version:major: pnpm -r exec -- npm version major --no-git-tag-version && node -e "const p=require('./packages/core/package.json'); console.log('v'+p.version)"
